name: SS&C Technologies Holdings Inc
business: SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. is the world's leading hedge fund and private equity administrator, as well as mutual fund transfer agent. The company provides the global financial services industry with a broad range of software-enabled services and specialized software products. It also serves the healthcare industry through SS&C Health, offering technology-enabled services and solutions including pharmacy and medical claims processing.
sellsTo: individual and government sponsored health plans

exposures.sentence: SS&C operates the Intralinks business, a leading provider of secure virtual data room solutions that support mergers and acquisitions, capital raising, investor reporting, and other strategic transactions.

our 2022 acquisition of Blue Prism enables us to deploy intelligent automation and robotic process automation ( RPA ), including artificial intelligence ( AI ) driven and agentic solutions, to improve the efficiency of our own operations and help clients modernize workflows across financial services and healthcare.

SS&C Health offerings include pharmacy and medical claims processing, clinical and care management programs, population health analytics, digital workforce solutions, and member engagement capabilities.
SS&C owns and operates a global data center footprint to ensure high uptime and regional service delivery for our customers.
Our Blue Prism services-led Agent Solutions offer domain-specific, production-tested and outcome-focused AI agents to fit specific business needs.
We have also adopted our own automation technology across SS&C operations, which is our Customer Zero program, meaning our solutions are tested in real-world use cases with tangible, proven outcomes.
